title: Private Eyes
album: Sounds of the Eighties: The Early '80s
why_this_song: Private Eyes by Hall & Oates (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 29 times; first heard in: "When it's watching for lies you can't escape my"
Appears 23 times; first heard in: "Private eyes they're watching you"
Appears 23 times; first heard in: "Private eyes they're watching you"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "Private eyes they're watching you"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "They see your every move"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "watching" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "watching" na música inteira?

excerpts.text: I see you and you see me
Private eyes, oh, they're watching you

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Private Eyes" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Private Eyes" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Private Eyes" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Private Eyes" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Private Eyes" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Private Eyes"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
